channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump administration pitches others to join new coalition to reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The "Maritime Freedom Construct" would coordinate diplomatic efforts.

item.title: Hegseth doubles down on attacking dissenters on Iran war as 'biggest adversary'
item.description: Democrats have concerns Trump won't honor the deadline, which falls on Friday.

item.title: Artemis astronaut Jeremy Hansen on what he missed about gravity: "Nothing"
item.description: When asked what was his favorite thing about gravity that he missed while in space, Artemis astronaut and mission specialist Jeremy Hansen laughingly ...

item.title: Jewish Londoners describe "utter horror" and living in fear after latest attack
item.description: "We've been warning about this for a long time," one local resident told CBS News. "It's like a tsunami — you see the smaller waves before the big one...
